title: helianthemum croceum subsp. suffruticosum
intro: Helianthemum croceum subsp. suffruticosum, also known as rockrose, is a perennial plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum croceum subsp. suffruticosum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used to treat various skin conditions and minor injuries.
